name: f19-stealth-glider
description: Operation Nightstep — a stealth puzzle on a live Conway's Game of Life field (B3/S23).
author: Jonathan D.A. Jewell (hyperpolymath) <j.d.a.jewell@open.ac.uk>

scripts.verify: cd src && for v in verify1 verify2 verify3 verify8 verify9; do node $v.mjs; done
scripts.build: cd src && node build.mjs && mv -f f19-stealth-glider.html ../f19-stealth-glider.html
